column1: # Per-crop sowing rates (kg of seed planted per hectare per growing cycle).
# Used in build_model/crops.py to deduct a "seed share" from crop_production
# link efficiency: post-seed yield = yield * (1 - seed_kg_per_ha/1000 / yield_t_per_ha).
# Country-specific yields therefore generate country-specific seed shares
# (low-yield countries reserve a higher fraction). The deduction is
# intentionally separate from FLW / consumption-side accounting.
# Validation: workflow/validation/seed_rates.py requires every crop in
# config["crops"] to have a row here. There is no fallback default in
#    AMORTIZED over typical stand life so it can be deducted yearly without
#    sugarcane: 6000 kg/ha fresh planting / ~4 yr ratoon cycle ~= 1500).
